title: NonSudo Policy Bundle
description: JSON Schema for nonsudo.yaml policy bundles. Every field introduced across all NonSudo sessions is represented here. Policy YAML is parsed and validated against this schema at proxy startup.

var_core_version.description: VAR Core spec version this bundle conforms to. Must be '0.1' for v1.0 deployments.

var_money_version.description: VAR-Money extension version. Required if any rules have money_action: true. Omit entirely for non-money deployments.

key_id.description: Ed25519 signing key identifier. Must match the key_id of the key pair in ~/.nonsudo/keys/. Use 'auto' to select the most recent key automatically.

mode.description: Deployment mode. Defaults to 'observe' if absent. 'attest' is reserved for v1.1.

enforcement.description: If false, the proxy records receipts but does not block any tool calls (observe mode). Equivalent to mode: observe with no blocking rules.

rules.description: Ordered list of policy rules. Rules are evaluated in declaration order; the first matching rule wins. If no rule matches, the default decision applies.

policy.description: Top-level policy envelope. Either declare rules directly or nest them under policy.rules.

default.description: Default decision when no rule matches.

key_id.description: Override the signing key used by the proxy. Use 'auto' to select most-recent.

queue_timeout_ms.description: Default policy evaluation timeout in milliseconds. A tool call that exceeds this produces a DEAD_LETTER receipt.

session_ttl_seconds.description: Idle session timeout. Sessions inactive for longer than this are evicted with close_reason: ttl_expired.

session_rate_limit.description: Maximum concurrent sessions. Requests beyond this limit receive HTTP 429.

provider.description: Named TSA provider (e.g. 'digicert', 'sectigo'). Used to set tsa_id in sidecar records.

url.description: TSA endpoint URL. Required if enabled: true and provider does not resolve to a built-in URL.

retry_attempts.description: Number of retry attempts before marking the TSA worker degraded.

accepting_tsa_ids.description: Allowlist of tsa_id values accepted during L3 verification. If empty, all TSA IDs are accepted.

receipt_file.description: Path to the NDJSON receipt file (stdio mode). Relative paths are resolved from cwd.

state_backend.description: State backend for workflow state. 'memory' uses in-process state (default). 'redis' uses the Redis URL from NONSUDO_REDIS_URL.

api_key_env.description: Environment variable name containing the LLM API key.

PolicyRule.title: PolicyRule
PolicyRule.description: A single policy evaluation rule. Rules are matched by tool name or glob pattern.

id.description: Unique rule identifier. Used in decision_reason and audit output.

tool.description: Tool name or glob pattern (using * as wildcard). Matching is case-sensitive. Use '*' to match all tools.

decision.description: Decision to apply when this rule matches.

reason.description: Human-readable explanation of the decision. Recorded in action_receipt.decision_reason.

blast_radius.description: Estimated blast radius of the tool action. Informational; recorded in the receipt.

reversible.description: Whether the tool action can be undone. Recorded in the receipt.

money_action.description: Declare this rule as governing a money action. Required for VAR-Money v1.0 enforcement.

unsafe_override.description: Explicitly suppress taxonomy-based money_action classification. Use only when the tool name matches a taxonomy pattern but is not a money action. This field name is intentionally alarming.

amount_field.description: Parameter field containing the action amount in minor units. Required when money_action: true.

currency_field.description: Parameter field containing the ISO 4217 currency code. Required when money_action: true.

idempotency_key_field.description: Parameter field containing the idempotency key. When declared, enables idempotency deduplication.

account_context_field.description: Parameter field containing the account context (e.g. Stripe account ID). Part of the idempotency dedupe tuple.

projection_id.description: Projection definition ID for outcome binding. Required for money actions in Enforce/Attest mode. References a built-in or operator-defined projection.

max_spend.description: Maximum cumulative spend in minor units for this rule within spend_window. Required when money_action: true.

spend_window.description: Accounting window for max_spend. 'session' resets on workflow close, 'daily' resets at UTC midnight, 'monthly' resets on the first of each month.

reservation_ttl_hours.description: Hours before a TIMEOUT-held budget reservation is released and a RESERVATION_EXPIRED receipt is emitted.

monthly_cap.description: Optional separate monthly ceiling in minor units, enforced independently of max_spend and spend_window.

params.description: Parameter-level conditions. All conditions must pass (AND logic) for the rule to match.

vcb.description: Per-rule velocity circuit breaker. Takes precedence over global velocity limits for this tool.

queue_timeout_ms.description: Per-rule policy evaluation timeout override. Overrides proxy.queue_timeout_ms for this specific tool.

ParamsCondition.title: ParamsCondition
ParamsCondition.description: A condition on a tool call parameter value. Uses dot notation for nested fields up to depth 5.

field.description: Dot-notation path to the parameter field (e.g. 'amount', 'metadata.account_id').

value.description: Comparison value. Type depends on op: string for eq/neq/match/not_match/in/not_in, number for gt/gte/lt/lte. Absent for exists/not_exists.

VelocityLimit.title: VelocityLimit
VelocityLimit.description: Velocity circuit breaker limit for a tool or pattern.

tool.description: Tool name or glob pattern. Use '*' for a global rate limit across all tools.

max_calls.description: Maximum number of calls permitted within the window.

window.description: Time window string. Supported formats: '<N>m' (minutes), '<N>h' (hours), 'session' (entire session), 'workflow' (per workflow_id).

examples._comment: Example 1: Minimal — ALLOW + BLOCK rules, no money actions.

rules.reason: Force push to main is prohibited

examples._comment: Example 2: Full — money action with Stripe refund projection, budget cap, VCB limit, STEP_UP rule.

rules.reason: Refunds of $500 or more require human approval
Only stripe_create_refund is declared in this policy
